{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322053600122F7454BB50D7679135"}"},"total":1443},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7527718941639541528","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"也是两天看到500多章最新章节了，看过我唐泽哥书的人肯定也喜欢这本，都差不多。某些没怎么看过末世文的第一次看可能不习惯，我的提议是看久了就习惯了，后面会越来越爽。唯一一个我认为的毒点就是后期作者越写越放开，开始玩梗，缝补加外设。也有一点点压战力，不过我耐性高，可以忍。毕竟都无敌了，不来点乐子就没什么好看的了。女主写的还好，能看，车开的也多。而且这也不是无脑爽，还是有一些铺垫，大世界观的，我只能说不会止步于末世丧尸（不剧透了）","text_exts":[{"e":208,"s":204,"text":"末世丧尸","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%A7%E5%B0%B8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774128960D7679135%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227527718941639541528%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227450414723792636990%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%A7%E5%B0%B8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752688668,"group_id":"7450414723792636990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"儿时的幻想，从写小说开始₍˄·͈༝·͈˄*₎◞ ̑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8oaZ7NILRA73/JIKjHWT4oCN5V/ckg1DRJUMWF/dYGo","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3380351951711380","user_name":"幻梦缝合"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3380351951711380","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450414723792636990","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断+系统+不圣母+美女多+反派+极度自私+冷血无情】
（原名：收女仆，从高傲邻妻开始）
（日更三章+绝不请假）
极寒降临，全球冰封。
末世来了，需要囤物资？
不！
我的物资每天发放！
末世孤苦，需要囤女神？
不！
女神会自己送上门！
当秩序崩溃的时候，人性、兽性相互交织。
为了面包，高傲邻妻可以低下头颅。
为了清水，女主播直接上才艺。
父母双亡的林冬，开局惨遭女友背叛，心灰意冷之际末世降临。
